sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74930" key="o)rqografe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-γρᾰφέω</orth>, <sense id="n74930.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make an elevation</tr_> (cf. sq. II), <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡς ὀρθογραφεῖται</foreign> as <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">is shown in the accompanying plan,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:193:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">193.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
